text.title: TDD Workflow Procedure
text.summary: 7-step per-behavior loop: write RED → run RED → write GREEN → run all → refactor → run all → commit.

section.title: Per-behavior loop
section.p: Step 1 — Write ONE failing test for the next behavior in behavior_order. Name it after the behavior, not the function.
Step 2 — Run the test_command. Confirm FAILED with the expected error message (not an import error). If it passes without implementation, the test is tautological — fix it before step 3.
Step 3 — Write the minimal implementation to pass that ONE test. No extra branches, no premature options (r3).
Step 4 — Run the full test_command. Confirm all tests pass.
Step 5 — Refactor if needed. Observable behavior MUST stay unchanged (r4).
Step 6 — Run the full test_command again. Confirm no regression.
Step 7 — Commit the test + implementation together (r5). Pick the next behavior; repeat.

text.reference: Settings.json hook fragment that auto-runs pytest on test file writes.
